subject: Update APPC certificate
commit_message:
Update APPC certificate




Issue-ID: AAI-1836
Change-Id: Ie89eb7f1c779aec67f85d1c6944ea666c4069801
Signed-off-by: Jimmy Forsyth <jf2512@att.com>
(cherry picked from commit aa228059d4b485730eca02d75f482683bf333c42)

entries.message: Patch Set 1: Cherry Picked from branch master.

Patch Set 1: Code-Review+1

Cherry-picking the certificates to El Alto branch.
We checked the newest El Alto MR APPC containers (checked 2020-07-23), they contain expired certificates, and APPC doesn`t respond to requests. If we really release El Alto Maintenance Release, we need to include APPC with updated certs.

Patch Set 1:

I have moved cert out appc container to oom helm chart. so we do not need to rebuild appc container.

We can follow this gerrit https://gerrit.onap.org/r/c/oom/+/104787 for elalto oom branch change.

Patch Set 1:

> Patch Set 1:
> 
> I have moved cert out appc container to oom helm chart. so we do not need to rebuild appc container.
> 
> We can follow this gerrit https://gerrit.onap.org/r/c/oom/+/104787 for elalto oom branch change.

Ok I`ll try to cherry-pick that one then.

Patch Set 1:

>

Unfortunately, we have a merge conflict in the secrets section.

Abandoned

https://gerrit.onap.org/r/c/oom/+/104787 is the future-proof way to go.
